category_sources: Official project pages describe kstart as a kinit daemon with keytab, renewal, and AFS support.
source_facts.description says kstart is a modified version of kinit that can use keytabs to authenticate.
display_name_sources: Official Eyrie project page and repository use the name kstart.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README says the kstart web page has the current documentation and resources.
source_facts.homepage is the official Eyrie kstart project page.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README states the eyrie.org Git repository is the canonical repository maintained by the author.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions kinit, keytabs, and authentication.
source_facts.executables lists k5start and krenew, matching ticket startup and renewal functionality.
